correction_note: Superseded an earlier version of this report. This version reflects the true, complete Wave 3 result.

background-task notification also reported 'killed', but the script had genuinely completed all 300 queries (query_count: 300, query_success_count: 268, duration_ms: 1942325 -- confirmed via its own written summary file plus direct DB re-verification)

listing_like_precision.detail: 173/174 -- 1 confirmed category/hub-page URL (mubawab.ma/fr/st/el-jadida/maisons-a-vendre, property_listing_id=827) slipped through because its snippet previewed one specific listing's details; found during this quality re-check, fixed in national-admission.ts (looksLikeNonListingPage extended to catch a bare plural-category+transaction-verb final URL segment at any path depth, independent of textual detail signals) before cron activation. The one already-written row is left as-is (not retroactively edited), documented as a known open item.
